base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rankings_ranks — a ui from 1992 super mario kart. Rank banners — 1st/2nd/3rd/4th + Congratulations + Mario-waves. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
